semantic.role: In-memory registry for view producers, mapping ViewType strings to their corresponding ViewProducer functions. Acts as the central service locator and extension point for the view rendering subsystem.
responsibilities: Provide a global registry mapping view types (ViewType) to view producer functions (ViewProducer).
Allow registration of producers via registerViewProducer, typically called during module initialization for built-in views.
Provide lookup of a producer by view type via getViewProducer, returning undefined if unregistered.
Enumerate all registered view types via listViewTypes.
outOfScope: View execution, rendering, data fetching, or business logic.
Caching or persistence of registry state.
invariants: The registry must be populated before any view execution request is processed.
Each view type can have at most one producer; re-registration overwrites the previous producer.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: This file establishes a clean extension point for view producers, decoupling view type resolution from individual producer implementations. It enables lazy registration and type-safe producer discovery.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: The recent commit refactors legacy CLI aliases and rebuilds documentation; this file's role as a registry is unchanged, but its consumption in the view-rendering pipeline may have been reorganized.

publicSurface.description: Registers a ViewProducer function for a given ViewType. Called by each built-in view module to announce its producer during initialization.
Retrieves the registered ViewProducer for the specified ViewType, or undefined if no producer has been registered.
Returns an array of all ViewType strings for which a producer has been registered.
